characters.name: Characters
characters.description: These arecharacters fromMy Name is Earl. Conditions of inclusion into family section:

characters.name: Nescobar-A-Lop-Lop
characters.description: Nescobar-A-Lop-LopSeason1,2,3,4First seenTeacher EarlLast seenInside Probe (Part 2)StatusAliveDate of birthJanuary 11, 1959 (as dated)OriginDemocratic Republic of the CongoPortrayed byAbdoulaye N'Gom  Nescobar-a-Lop-Lopwas a former student ofEarl Hickeyin his foreign students class. After learning English he became a friend of Earl. His father was apparently killed by a rhinoceros. He is married to a Chinese woman, and speaks Mandarin("The Trial").

characters.name: Ann Washington
characters.description: Ann Washington, sometimes called Ray-Ray Ann Ann "Ray-Ray Ann" Washingtonalso sometimes calledRay-Ray Annby her surrogate parentJoy Turner, is the baby girl and daughter of her biological parentsRay-RayandLiberty Washingtonwho were both very happy to have a family. She appeared inMidnight Bun. The battle for who's in charge continues forJoy, too, as she checks herself into the hospital and demands labor inducing drugs.Darnellreminds her that she gaveLibertyher word that she would have a natural childbirth rather then having her half- sister's baby coming into the world dripping with lies, but Joy points out that her word means nothing.

characters.name: Ann Washington

characters.name: Arthur Hill
characters.description: Arthur HillSeason4Appeared inOrphan EarlStatusAlivePortrayed byHal Landon Jr. Arthur Hillis an old man who lives inCamden County. A couple of weeks beforeEarldiscoveredKarmahe andJoysaw an advert on TV about orphans in Africa Joy realized could make a fortune by scamming people so they went around withRandytelling people they were helping children in Africa but only got a $100 cheque which was from Arthur.

characters.name: Catalina Aruca
characters.description: Catalina Rana ArucaSeason1,2,3,4First seenPilotLast seen-StatusAliveAge30OriginGuadalatucky, then La PazProfessionMotel maid, Exotic DancerPortrayed byNadine Velazquez  Catalina Rana Arucais a Bolivian immigrant from La Paz("Earl and Joy's Anniversary")who works as a maid in theMotelthatEarlandRandylive in, and is a stripper atClub Chubby. She has several siblings, including some she didn't even know if they are alive or not. She is the green card wife of Randy Hickey. She is afraid of snakes and rape.

characters.name: Gertrude Balboa
characters.description: Gertrude BalboaSeason1Appeared inBroke Joy's Fancy FigurineStatusAlivePortrayed byEllen Albertini Dow Gertrude Balboawas the head of the company that manufactured the figurines won in thePrettiest Pretty Princessbeauty pageant. Earlwent to see Gertrude Balboa about purchasing one of the figurines, but she explained that it was not possible, as the only way to get one was to win one in the mother-daughter beauty pageant. Earl explained that he wanted to buy one for his ex-wifeJoy Darville, spurring Gertrude to remember Joy when she won the figure as a child in1981. However, she only won it once as the year afterShelly Stokerand her mother began to enter, and they won every year after that. Earl thanked her, and left("Broke Joy's Fancy Figurine")

characters.name: Billy Hoyne
characters.description: Billy HoyneSeasonSeason 2Season 3First seenGet a Real JobLast seenI Won't Die with a Little Help from My Friends (Part 1)Also Known AsN/AStatusAliveAgeUnknownDate of birthUnknownOriginCamden CountyProfessionDocker at Waadt AppliencePortrayed byBilly GardellImages Billy Hoyne is a docker at Waadt Applience and the twin brother ofJeff Hoyne Billy was one ofEarlandRandy's friend when while they were working at Waadt Applience. When Earl want to work out the front of the store Billy disapproved of this and damaged an oven door that Earl had fixed on propose. But Billy was amazed when Earl got out his own stock after he was promoted when it was raining as it no one else out front had even done that before and to help Earl achieve his dream job requested to purchase an oven off him after the store closed.("Get a Real Job")

characters.name: Blake
characters.description: BlakeSeason4First seenEarl and Joy's AnniversaryLast seenEarl and Joy's AnniversaryStatusAliveOriginCamden CountyProfessionFashion ModelPortrayed byJason Priestley  BlakeisEarl's andRandy's obnoxious cousin and a very successful professional backpack model seen the top outdoor catalogs. He still has an attitude of a pretty boy that can get the girls and tick off the guys ever since he and Earl were kids. Blake first appeared inEarl & Joy's Anniversary.

characters.name: Bob Smiley
characters.description: Bob SmileySeason1,2,3First seenCost Dad the ElectionLast seenOur Other 'Cops' Is On! (Part 2)StatusAliveDate of birth1950sPortrayed byGeorge Frangides Bob Smiley is aCamden Countypolice officer. WhenEarlandJoywere married, Joy often drove and Earl andRandysat in the back, Earl threw a can on to Bob’s car so he pulled them over. Joy started arguing with Earl while Bob told her to get back in the car or he would use his tazer, Joy walked towards Bob so he used the tazer, Earl got up and pined Bob up to his car. Earl was caught on camera andCarlwho was trying to run for mayor at the time lost votes because of this("Cost Dad the Election").

characters.name: Bobbi
characters.description: BobbiSeason1Appeared inThe Bounty HunterStatusAlivePortrayed byDana Cuomo Bobbiwas a friend ofJoy's before she married Earl. Bobbi encouraged Joy to marryEarlso she would have money to support her child. She, along withRobin, got Earl drunk enough to not realise Joy was pregnant, and marry her("The Bounty Hunter").

characters.name: Bobbi
characters.description: BobbiSeason1Appeared inThe Bounty HunterStatusAlivePortrayed byDana Cuomo Bobbiwas a friend ofJoy's before she married Earl. characters.name: Brett Hansen
characters.description: Brett HansenSeason3Appeared inKillerballStatusAlivePortrayed byChristopher Thornton Brett and her sisterTiffanywere Earl and Randy's neighbors when they were kids. Earl and Randy were jealous of Brett and Tiffany because their parents always took them on cool vacations, however one day they went a sky diving vacation with torn parachutes and were paralyzed from the waist down. Earl decided to have some fun and he and Randy took Brett and Tiffany’s wheelchairs leaving them out in the sun and Brett got leg humped by a Doberman.

characters.name: Candy Stoker
characters.description: Candy Stoker Candy Stokerplayed by Chloe Moretz is the daughter ofShelly Stoker. Like her mother, Candy is too comes from a long line of highly skilled knife throwers and she has always known of this talent since she was two years old. Though she doesn't want to be in the family business and she hated beauty pageants she doesn't wanna be in. She appeared alongside her mother inBroke Joy's Fancy Figurine. After meeting the manufacturer of the "Prettiest Pretty Princess" figurine,Mrs. Gertrude Balboawho explains that it has been a prize in a mother-daughter beauty pagent for over 40 years, and they can never be sold.

characters.name: Cappy
characters.description: CappySeason4Appeared inSold a Guy a Lemon CarStatusAlivePortrayed byTed Rooney  Cappy was onceEarlandRandy'sneighbor at ThePalms Motelwho would't stop talking and telling stories, Randy liked him but Earl didn't and signaled toCatalinato move him to a different room which upset Randy. After crossingLloydoff his list, Earl realized he only saw the bad in Lloyd and needed to be like Randy who saw the good in him, so Earl joined in to Randy and Cappy's conversation when they were talking by the pool.

characters.name: Carter O'Dell
characters.description: Carter O'Dell Carter O'Dellplayed by Jamie Mcshane is the husband ofDonna, and the father ofGerald, the young faith healer who once happened to be known only as God's Little Finger. But the secret behind his son's divine gift of "healing" was a actually a scam he had cooked up few years ago, making him a bit of a crook with using his own boy and his "gift" as a front to make money for him and his family, but have finally told Gerald the truth in the end before it was too late. He appeared inI Won't Die with a Little Help from My Friends (Part 2).

characters.name: Charmaine
characters.description: CharmaineSeason1Appeared inO Karma, Where Art Thou?StatusAlivePortrayed byTyler Kain Charmaine isMr. Patrick's ex-wife. Earlmeets Charmaine when Mr. Patrick made him take some toilet paper to his house, since Mr. Patrick was horrible Earl could't understand why he deserved to have a wife as beautiful and kind as Charmaine and whyKarmawasn't punishing him. Earl also discovered that Mr. Patrick was secretly cheating on Charmaine with another beautiful woman.

characters.name: Clark Clark
characters.description: Clark ClarkSeason4Appeared inMonkeys Take a BathStatusAlivePortrayed byDavid Paymer Clark Clark used to beCarlandKay's neighbor. Clark and his wifeCathyused to be Carl and Kay's best friends. In the 1980s whenEarlandRandysaw Clark, a grown man, shed tears, they thought it was hilarious and decided that they had to see it again. Accordingly, they left stuff on his door step, such as a nest with broken eggs and a fake newspaper with the headline "Baby Suicides At An All High Time". One day, Earl and Randy saw Clark talking to Kay and pointed to the window that Earl and Randy were looking out from, and he then put a for sale sign in front of his house.

characters.name: Mr. Covington
characters.description: Mr. CovingtonSeason1Appeared inStole P's HD CartStatusAlivePortrayed byLou Wagner Mr. Convingtonwas the owner of the Winky Dinky co-operation. Earlmanaged to get a job at the Winky Dinky headquarters so he could tel Mr. Covington about how one of his store managers had paid someone off to burn down a competing hot dog vendor (Pops). Covington did not want to know about the situation, saying that if he had to testify in court he did not want to have to lie("Stole P's HD Cart").

She visited him regularly whilst he was inside("Frank's Girl").

characters.name: Carson Daly
characters.description: Carson DalySeason1,4First seenPilotLast seenRandy's List ItemStatusAliveDate of birthJune 22, 1973ProfessionTelevision host, radio personality, producer, and television personality. Carson Dalyis a presenter who hosts the talk show "Last Call with Carson Daly". WhilstEarlwas in hospital after being run down, he sees an episode of "Last Call with Carson Daly", in which Daly explains the concept ofkarmato his guestTrace Adkins. This has a great influence upon Earl, who takes the idea of "do good things, good things happen to you" to heart, inspiring him to createThe List("Pilot").

characters.name: Daneesha Monroe
characters.description: Daneesha Monroe Daneesha Monroeplayed by Pam Trotter is the other sister ofDarnell 'Crabman' TurnerandPam Monroewhich makes her a biological child of the old government agentThomas Monroe. She appeared at her brother and hersister-in law'sweddingalongside her 'mom'. Though it's not quite clear how she got herself into the Witness Protection Program in the first place, or maybe Darnell himself had to put her in there alongside him in order to prevent her suffering the same fate as their poor sister Pam had before. But one thing for certain, Daneesha would always love her dear brother Crabman no matter what. Daneesha Monroe is a kind, sweet woman who loves her brother "Crabman" akaHarry Monroein spite of what happened because of theirfather, including the time his former government agency sent and nearly had Harry killed by a young boy namedHunhauwho happened to be the master and leader of apediocracticsociety of New Zealand revolutionary socialists known as the Ompti Nation. She's also in the United States' Federal Witness Program (though it is almost unclear how), and have amother(her real mom or just a part of hers and Darnell's cover within Witness Protection).
